home.title: Activate Your USALOCALSIM Service
home.subtitle: Our technical team manually processes every request for guaranteed quality. Follow the steps below:

activate.title: Activate Your USALOCALSIM Service
activate.subtitle: Our technical team manually processes every request for guaranteed quality. Follow the steps below:
activate.option1Title: Option 1: I have a USALOCALSIM Card and a Voucher
activate.option1Desc: Enter your ICCID and Voucher code. Your activation will be processed manually in minutes at no extra cost.
activate.option2Title: Option 2: I only have a USALOCALSIM Card
activate.option2Desc: Enter your ICCID to choose your data plan and pay by credit card. Your initial SIM cost will be discounted.
activate.option3Title: Option 3: I have an eSIM Voucher
activate.option3Desc: Enter your voucher code to receive your digital QR code via email once processed by our team.
activate.optionHint: Option 1: Enter ICCID + Voucher (Combo). Option 2: ICCID only (choose plan and pay). Option 3: eSIM voucher only.
activate.comboEmailHint: Enter your email. Your activation will be processed manually in minutes at no extra cost.
activate.esimEmailHint: Enter your email to receive your digital QR code once processed by our team.

activateUs.title: US eSIM activation
activateUs.subtitle: For US residents: enter your eSIM voucher code only. Unlimited data plans for 30, 60, or 90 days. Our team processes each request manually.
activateUs.esimEmailHint: Enter your email to receive your eSIM QR code once our team has processed your request.
activateUs.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Request Received!
success.message: Our technical team is now manually activating your USALOCALSIM service. You will receive a confirmation message/email in a few minutes once your line is live.
success.messagePaid: Thank you. Your order is recorded and our team will process your activation.
success.stillProcessing: Your payment is confirmed; we are still linking your activation. Refresh this page in a moment or check your email.

plan.title: Choose your data plan
plan.subtitle: Choose a plan to continue to checkout. Your initial SIM hardware cost is discounted when you pay.
plan.noUpgradePlans: No higher-tier plans are available for this SIM. Contact support if you need help.
plan.missingEmail: Missing email. Go back to checkout and enter your email first.
plan.currentStatusHint: What we have on file for this SIM — not a plan you tap to buy.
plan.confirmExistingTitle: You already have a plan on file
plan.confirmExistingBody: This SIM already has a pending or active plan. Do you want to continue to checkout for {plan}? Completing payment may update your pending activation.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Enter your email for order updates. Next, you will choose your data plan and pay by card.
checkout.missingParams: Missing ICCID. Start from the activation page.
